Our Story

Building India's Industrial Future

Maha Laxmi Engineers was established on January 11, 2018, with a focused mission: delivering world-class fabrication, erection, and installation services for the water treatment and industrial sector across India.

We specialize in STP, WTP, ETP, Gas Holder Tanks, Digesters, IC Reactors, ICX Reactors, Fire Fighting systems, and Labour Supply. Our journey began with pioneers Degremont Lead Partner & SUEZ India Pvt. Ltd.

Over the years, we have progressively advanced our capabilities towards a full scope of diversified and specialized services — assisting clients at every stage of their project lifecycle.

"To provide you with real value, outstanding service, and exceptional performance regardless of the size or complexity of your project."

What We Offer

Full-Scope Industrial Services

Diversified expertise covering every stage of your project lifecycle

💧

Treatment Plant Solutions

Complete fabrication, erection & installation of water and wastewater treatment systems.

  • ETP — Effluent Treatment Plants
  • STP — Sewage Treatment Plants
  • WTP — Water Treatment Plants
  • IC Reactor & ICX Reactor
  • Gas Holder Tank & Digesters
🛢️

Storage & Vessel Works

Design, fabrication, repair and maintenance of all types of storage and pressure vessels.

  • Storage Tanks — All Capacities
  • Tank Repairs & Maintenance
  • Pressure Vessel Repairs
  • Boilers Refurbishment & Overhaul
🏗️

Structural & Civil Works

Precision structural steel fabrication, erection, and comprehensive civil construction services.

  • Steel Fabrication & Erection
  • Mechanical & Piping Works
  • Construction Services
  • Surface Preparation & Cleaning
🔥

Fire Protection Systems

Complete fire fighting system design, supply, and installation with full compliance.

  • Fire Fighting System Design
  • Supply & Installation
  • Safety System Integration
⚡

Electrical & Instrumentation

Full electrical and instrumentation works for industrial facilities and projects.

  • Electrical System Installation
  • Instrumentation Works
  • Control Panel Setup
👷

Certified Manpower Supply

Qualified workforce including certified welders, fitters, engineers, and supervisors.

  • Certified Welders & Supervisors
  • Structural Fitters & Pipefitters
  • Professional Engineers
  • Painters, Loaders & More

Our Foundation

Vision, Mission & Values

Vision
Industry's Most Respected Company

To become the most respected and prominent service company in our industry — known for unwavering dedication to excellence in everything we do, every day.

Mission
New Standard of Quality & Safety

To bring the industry a new standard of quality, craftsmanship, safety, and technical support at a competitive price — making customer satisfaction our absolute top priority.

Values
Integrity, Honesty & Trust

Our foundation is built on integrity, honesty, safety, and quality. We build trust-based, collaborative relationships with our clients and industry partners that last for years.

"

To provide you with real value, outstanding service, and exceptional performance regardless of the size or complexity of your project.

— Our Promise to Every Client
Safety First

Our Commitment to a Safe Workplace

Protecting and preserving the working environment is central to everything we do. Our safety track record defines who we are.

01

Daily job hazard analysis meetings held before any work begins on site

02

All staff and team members trained to prioritize safety before beginning any task

03

Routine training and updates on the best industry safety practices conducted regularly

04

Extensive onboarding training for all new team members before active work

05

Team members rewarded for operating in a safe and productive manner

06

All hours tracked diligently to prevent fatigue and mitigate exhaustion-related risks

Zero Compromise on Safety
Every project. Every site. Every team member.
